plays.summary: Cole Ragans is at 3.52 xFIP — above average — going up against a near league average CHW lineup (95 wRC+). Tough spot for CHW's bats. 30°F further suppresses scoring, and 27mph wind blowing R to L tilts under. No line yet — model is at 7.3 runs. Watch for a under when odds open.

Taijuan Walker is at a 4.86 xFIP this season — below average — and ATL's lineup is near league average at 101 wRC+. That's a favorable matchup for the offense. The park (PF 104) is hitter-friendly. 48°F further suppresses scoring pulls the other way, but not enough to flip the lean. No line yet — model is at 9.6 runs. Watch for a over when odds open.
